label: shoulder4_night_n7_pitchboost_sideamp300
command: Night N7 PitchBoost SideAmp Conservative：完全保留 N7P 的前后摆手和 roll 零基础，只把侧移动态外展 extra_amp 从 0.38 提到 0.46、roll_max 从 0.30 提到 0.34、dynamic_min_outward 从 0.08 提到 0.10。
note: Conservative side-lift-only tune based on N7P. shoulder_dynamic_roll_base_amp remains 0.0; pitch amp remains 0.84.
